resources.string: End the call to record a voice message
This code has expired. Please request a new one
Too many attempts, please try again later
"Number not found, please make sure it's entered correctly"
To find people you know and start chatting
"To leave voice messages and take calls"
To find people you know here
To find people you know here
Which language would you like to continue in?
You turned off a participant’s camera
You turned off all cameras. Participants can turn on their own cameras.
You turned off all microphones. Participants can unmute themselves.
An admin stopped the screen recording
Settings apply to everyone except admins
"Participants can join only after you've let them in"
Select MAX in device settings and allow camera and microphone access
Allow camera and microphone access in device settings
Select MAX in device settings and allow microphone access
Allow microphone access in device settings
You’ll be able to make calls and record voice messages
"Pull down to show the speaker in fullscreen"
To join, ask an admin to add you to the chat
Wait for an admin to start the call
You were removed from the call
"An admin didn't allow you to join the call"
"You've restricted microphone access. You can allow it in Settings"
"To leave voice messages and take calls"
Your call history will be here
Who would you like to call?
Waiting for admin to start the call
"Notifications are also visible to everyone. Enable Do Not Disturb so they don't bother you"
The other participant muted their microphone
We’ll process the recording and send it to Favorites
You stopped and deleted the screen recording
They will be able to join the call once added
New members will be added to %s
%s will stay in the chat and be able to join the call again
"You can close the waiting room. We'll immediately notify you if someone joins it."
An admin has restricted turning on microphones and cameras
An admin turned off your camera, but you can turn it back on
An admin has restricted turning on cameras
An admin muted your microphone, but you can turn it back on
An admin has restricted turning on microphones
Recording will continue while there are participants in the call
We’ll send the recording to Favorites
An admin can stop the recording
By staying, you consent to being recorded
The connection will be more stable
Failed to create link. Please wait and try again.
The other person will be able to see your chats, passwords and SMS codes
Call participants will be able to see chats, passwords and SMS codes
The current call will end automatically
"Unable to open camera. There may not be a suitable app on your device."
"Failed to open media. Your device may not have a suitable app installed."
Transfer rights to the channel to save content for followers
"All chat members will lose access to it"
Are you sure you want to delete %s?
"Saved messages, media and files can't be restored"
"Are you sure you want to clear Favorites?"
"You've left the group and deleted the chat"
Transfer ownership so the other members can continue chatting
Press Start to start chatting with the bot and see it in action
Want to see what this bot can do?
Are you sure you want to delete chat \"%s\"?
Failed to copy photo to clipboard
Only moderators will see your report
What would you like to report?
Write a message or send this sticker
You can start chatting once the user adds you to their contacts or messages you first
Members will see the full chat history
This chat is only available from the call
Save messages, media and files. Only you will have access to them
Chats in it will remain in the All folder
Something went wrong, please try again later
Unable to connect to the network, please check your connection
Something went wrong, please try to send your request later
Are you sure you want to delete %s?
Are you sure you want to block this contact?
You prohibit the contact from writing and calling you
First name, last name or number
First name, last name or username
Are you sure you want to unblock this contact?
Show chat history to new members?
Add the first one and it will appear here
Link your contacts to find friends on the app and chat with them
Install a browser on your device
No more than %d chats and channels can be on your favorites list
Unable to write and call with this version. Please update the app to continue using MAX
Your version of MAX is out of date
"You'll start following the channel once an admin approves the request"
Users waiting for request approval will automatically become channel followers
The channel can only be joined after the request is approved by an admin
Users who submitted them will become followers of the channel \"%s\"
Users who submitted them will not become followers of the channel \"%s\"
"Link is out of date or doesn't work"
Only part of the gallery is displayed
No photos or videos in Gallery
Not enough space in the gallery
Go to Settings > Permissions and select Camera and Files and media content in the Denied section.
Allow access to files and camera in device settings
Go to Settings > Permissions and select Files and media content in the Denied section.
Allow access to files and media in device settings
Allow access to send photos and videos from this device
No access to files and media
New posts will appear here soon
Share the channel to support the creator
You can now invite followers and start chatting
You can chat, leave reactions and share files
"Unable to open. You've selected only safe content in Settings"
"Post hidden. You've allowed only safe content in Settings."
"You don't have access to this message"
"You don't have access to this chat"
Select an answer option. You cannot re-vote
Go to Settings > Permissions and tap Files in the Forbidden section.
Allow access to files in device settings
Double tap a message to leave a reaction
The selected area of the photo is too small
Do you want to delete chats?
No suitable app on this device
Chat with %s has an unsent message
Select a theme to change the chat background and message color 🎨
Change the theme at any time
Preview what your chats will look like
MAX is working in the background
Join the channel using this link: %s
Only moderators will see the report
You can also select a reason to send a report
Thank you for making MAX a safe space
What would you like to report?
You selected to only show safe content in Settings
Swipe to either side to change the playback speed
"You can no longer write or call each other"
But you can send this person an invite
"We're already working on expanding that list"
"You can't sign in using numbers from certain countries yet"
Only download files and install apps from trusted sources
Chats in it will remain in \"All\"
Add specific chats or chat types such as personal or groups
"You've created a maximum amount of folders"
The original sender will be shown
"You can hide the original sender. The message will look like it's yours"
The original sender will be hidden
This phone number belongs to you
Too many characters, try to shorten
If they are already on MAX, you can start chatting right away
"You may have received the code in MAX and other messengers"
"If you haven't received the SMS, check the %s chat on MAX"
You can request a new code in
You will need to confirm your phone number again and enter the code to sign in
This is how other users will see you
To sign in, you need a Russian phone number or one from a country on the list. Tap a flag to select
"Which phone number do you want to sign in with?"
Upload your photo or select an avatar
You can select a pre-made avatar to add flair to your profile
By pressing Continue, you accept the Privacy Policy and User Agreement
"You've enabled background activity. This will help you stay in touch"
Stay in touch when the internet connection is unstable
"Digital ID is now easy to access and contacts can be searched"
Stay in touch when the internet connection is unstable
How not to miss calls and notifications
Notify when users from your contacts sign up
Enter a question and at least one answer
The results will be saved, but no one will be able to vote in the poll anymore
"Unable to open camera. There may not be a suitable app on your device."
"It won't be possible to restore the posts"
"Are you sure you want to clear %s's chat history?"
The channel will be deleted for all followers. It will not be possible to restore its content
Are you sure? This cannot be undone
To prevent the channel from being deleted for all followers, you can transfer the rights to another owner
"All chat members will lose access to It"
Transfer ownership so the other members can continue chatting
Are you sure you want to delete %s?
"We'll delete it after 30 days so you have time to change your mind"
Are you sure you want to delete your profile?
You will need to transfer ownership before you can do so
Are you sure you want to leave the channel?
Are you sure you want to leave?
Others can use the short name to find you and start chatting
You can use the following characters: a-z, 0-9 and hyphens. Minimum length: 4 characters
To scan a QR code, please allow access to the camera
Scan the QR code to sign in to your profile
"Scan the QR code or upload a photo or video from Gallery"
Point your camera at the QR code
To scan the QR code, please allow access to Gallery
"Unable to open camera. There may not be a suitable app on your device."
Dump active push notifications to logs
Disable checking recent crashes and reviews in InAppReview
Are you sure you want to unblock %s?
Use the device on which you enabled safe mode or contact technical support to reset the PIN code
You will only see safe content in channels and posts
"Contact Support, and we'll help you reset it"
"People won't be able to find you via phone number"
Only people in your contacts will be able to call you
"Only those you've previously chatted with can invite you to groups"
Chats only with people you know
You will only see safe posts and channels
"People who can't message, call or add you to chats"
Who can invite me to chats
"You won't be able to see the online status of other users"
Who can see my online status
Who can find me by number
Who can see my phone number
Disable safe mode to change settings
The file can be up to 15 min long and no larger than 50 MB
The file can be no longer than 15 min
The file must not be larger than 50 MB
Increase the volume to listen to ringtones
Media can be re-downloaded once deleted
Media can be re-downloaded once deleted
Your profile is under additional protection
"Password set. You'll need to enter it when signing in to your profile"
"You'll only need an SMS code to sign in"
Do you want to disable sign-in password?
You can only recover your password with an email address
You may lose access to profile without email
You can request a new code in %s
What code did you receive in the email?
The new email address will replace the old one: %s
You decided not to delete your profile
An additional password for each new MAX sign-in. Set it to protect your profile further
"Now you'll need to enter a password and SMS code on every sign-in. For your safety, all sessions except for the current one were ended."

"If you forget your password and didn't add an email address, you won't be able to sign in to your profile.
You can delete your profile, in which case, your data and chats will disappear after seven days. You'll be able to sign up using the same number again."
What to do if you forgot your password
Unable to create channel, please try again later
Come up with a look that stands out from the rest
Add a photo so people can recognize the channel quickly
All sent stickers will be displayed in this section
You’ve got no recent stickers yet
Are you sure you want to delete the set?
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s %2$s?
Are you sure you want to delete all favorite stickers?
Are you sure you want to delete all recent stickers?
Only you will see the story
Update MAX to view the message. This version is out of date.
Select MAX in device settings and enable both toggles
Allow camera and microphone access in device settings
Enable access to the locked screen
"Without this setting, you won't see an incoming call if someone calls you on MAX"
"To fix this, please go to your settings and tap Allow"
"To fix this, please go to your settings and tap Disable"
"To fix this, please go to your settings and tap Yes"
"To fix this, please go to your settings and select Without restrictions"
Allow microphone access in device settings
Allow microphone access for video recording
To record videos, allow microphone access in device settings
"You'll be able to send audio messages in chats"
To make video calls, allow access to camera and microphone.
Allow access to camera and microphone
To make video calls, allow access to camera.
You can allow access to camera in device settings
To take and share photos, allow access to the camera
To take and share photos, allow camera access in device settings
To send photos and videos, allow access to the camera
"We'll upload the contacts to our server via a secure connection so you can find your friends here faster"
"We'll upload the contacts to our server via a secure connection so you can find your friends here faster"

"Location data is turned off for MAX in your device settings. MAX needs location data when using the app to enable sharing points on a map to chats and channels.
List of MAX features using background location: - People Nearby contacts search — no - Sending location to chats and channels — no - Live location sharing — yes, always in use, when the app is closed or not in use
You can change MAX permissions at any time in device settings"
You can show where you are, how to get to the right coffee shop, or which stop to get off at
Allow location access in device settings
"You'll be able to receive messages and calls"
You will be able to record video messages
Allow access to camera and microphone
Unable to add this bot to the chat
Unable to add this contact to the chat
Unable to add this bot to the channel
Unable to add this contact to the chat
Unable to create a chat with this bot
Unable to create a channel with this bot
Unable to create a channel with this contact
Unable to create a chat with this contact
Unable to forward message to this bot
Unable to forward message to this channel
Unable to forward message to this contact
Unable to add user to chat
Unable to add user to channel
Unable to create chat with this user
Unable to create channel with this user
"Message can't be forwarded to this user"
To only receive invites from your contacts, please edit the privacy settings
"It won't be possible to restore the posts"
"Are you sure you want to clear %s's chat history?"
To prevent the channel from being deleted for all followers, you can transfer the rights to another owner
Are you sure you want to delete the chat?
Are you sure you want to delete %s?
Your profile will be deleted today as per your request
Are you sure you want to delete the %s chat?
First allow the admin to add and remove members
"Do you want to transfer ownership for %s? You'll no longer be the chat owner. This can't be undone"
"They'll only be able to remove admins they've added themselves"
Are you sure you want to remove %s from admins?
Edit chat name, photo and description
"The channel link will appear after saving"
Please try again or come back later
Channel can be found in global search
You can find the chat and join it through search
The previous link will no longer work
Do you want to update the link?
You can invite anyone using this link
The previous link will no longer work once changed
Are you sure you want to update the link?
"Please check your internet connection and try again"
You will need to transfer ownership before you can do so
Are you sure you want to leave the channel?
Are you sure you want to delete the message from the chat?
Are you sure you want to delete the file %s from the chat?
Are you sure you want to delete the message with a link from the chat?
Are you sure you want to remove media from the chat?
You selected to only show safe content in Settings
"Unable to open. You've selected only safe content in Settings"
This user is already an admin
Are you sure you want to remove %s from admins?
Are you sure you want to remove from the channel
Are you sure you want to remove from chat
Are you sure you want to remove %s from the channel?
Are you sure you want to remove %s from chat?
Tap and hold to schedule the post
Tap and hold to send later
Tap and hold to get a reminder
Video will be sent with no sound
Video will be sent with sound on
To do this, go to your profile → Devices → Sign in with QR code
profile → Devices → Sign in with QR code
QR code sign-in available from Devices section
To scan a QR code, please allow camera access
QR code outdated. Please try again
End all sessions except current one
"Sign in on new devices and manage sessions"
"This QR code isn't for signing in"
Language will only change on this device
Please check your internet connection and try again
"Unable to open. You've selected only safe content in Settings"
You started a conversation with the bot
An admin changed the channel name to %s
You changed the chat name to %s
An admin deleted the chat photo
An admin deleted the channel name
I use MAX messenger. Join me! %s
You can also select a reason to send a report
Thank you for making MAX a safe space
Failed to open video. File does not exist
The system can’t detect the camera
Video not found or not available to watch
End the call to record a video message
You can enable sign in via Face ID or fingerprint in your profile
Enable sign in via Face ID or fingerprint
Sign in with Face ID or fingerprint
What would you like to attach?
Check your connection and try again
There should be no spaces in the link
Please check that the link is correct
The link must start with https://, http:// or max://
The link must be at least 4 symbols long
